title: astragalus glabellus
intro: Astragalus glabellus, also known as the smooth milk vetch or astragalus, is a species of plant in the legume family. It is a perennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The plant has been used to promote health benefits such as reducing fatigue, improving immune function, and enhancing cardiovascular health. Astragalus glabellus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
